title: Prismatic Grain
description: Une esthétique cinématographique en film 35 mm caractérisée par un grain ISO prononcé, une faible profondeur de champ et des fuites de lumière optiques vibrantes. Les sujets sont baignés d'une lumière douce et diffuse avec des gélatines bicolores, créant une atmosphère onirique aux contours flous.
description_en: A cinematic 35mm film aesthetic characterized by heavy ISO grain, shallow depth of field, and vibrant optical light leaks. Subjects are bathed in soft, diffused lighting with strong bi-color gels, creating a dreamy, nostalgic atmosphere with soft-focus edges.
description_fr: Une esthétique cinématographique en film 35 mm caractérisée par un grain ISO prononcé, une faible profondeur de champ et des fuites de lumière optiques vibrantes. Les sujets sont baignés d'une lumière douce et diffuse avec des gélatines bicolores, créant une atmosphère onirique aux contours flous.
prompt: Analog 35mm film photography, cinematic dream pop aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, full bleed to all four corners with no borders, no canvas edges, and no white margins. Implement an extreme shallow depth of field with a precise focal plane, contrasting against heavily blurred background elements that exhibit smooth, buttery optical bokeh. Lighting is defined by soft, diffused illumination mixed with aggressive, highly saturated bi-color studio gels. A massive, glowing foreground optical light leak—acting as a physical prism flare—washes heavily across the frame in vibrant {{primary_color}} and intense {{accent_color}}, partially obscuring the underlying scene with a luminous, hazy, semi-transparent color gradient. The out-of-focus background and shadow regions are deeply tinted with a rich, moody {{secondary_color}} atmosphere, creating a strong split-complementary color harmony. Textures are strictly analog: heavy, coarse ISO 800 film grain, subtle digital color noise, and pronounced halation around bright highlights. Edges of the in-focus elements remain soft, organic, and beautifully feathered by the optical diffusion and the overwhelming color bleed of the prominent light leaks. Introduce subtle chromatic aberration and lens distortion at the periphery. The overall mood is deeply nostalgic, atmospheric, and visually dense with authentic retro-photographic imperfections., 35mm film, light leak, heavy grain, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, prism flare, color gel photography, dream pop aesthetic, halation, optical blur, analog texture, glowing edges, soft focus, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A heavily blurred, out-of-focus cinematic environment. Soft, abstract shapes bathed in a moody {{secondary_color}} atmosphere. Smooth, buttery bokeh and shallow depth of field create a dreamy, indistinct landscape. A massive, glowing optical light leak in vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} washes across the frame, adding a luminous haze. Heavy, coarse ISO 800 film grain and subtle color noise overlay the entire scene. Nostalgic, analog aesthetic with halation and soft transitions.
background_prompt_removebg: A heavily blurred, out-of-focus cinematic environment. Soft, abstract shapes bathed in a moody {{secondary_color}} atmosphere. Smooth bokeh creates a dreamy landscape. A glowing optical light leak in vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} washes across the frame. Heavy film grain overlays the scene. A subtle, luminous prism-flare vignette acts as a framing element in the foreground, creating depth. The entire atmospheric scene and optical flares fade smoothly into a clean {{background_color}} surface.
